reviews.review_description:
Midnight 27123, I gotta ask whats with the intense steering wheel obsession? 
Now the main review since im trying to be reasonable and give 5 stars on every game I review i consider this to be one of the better ones. Although everything does need an overhaul. Good game devs
Fun game but when i first got it i got mad because it was stealing asphalt legends video (sigh) like really don't steal come up with something new
Fast racing, smooth controls, and intense action make every run exciting.

Let's talk about what's good The cars look good The inside terrier look good I said the track's kind of look good I really didn't see nothing wrong with the environment need more tracks definitely more tracks dramatic weather like rain thunderstorm night time driving with headlights more cars definitely more cars it's fun now the problem I have with the game is the steering it's like your hands when you turn this slides on the steering wheel don't really like have that grip to it and when I turn it on turn like it should My hands just be sliding all over the steering wheel when I try to turn so that needs to be fixing cuz you can't really turn like you want to if for some reason my other hand will stop working and just slide on around the wheel or one hand is grabbing it you can fix the steering with the grip in on the steering wheel that'll make the game more better and the turn needs to be more into the turn see you when you turn the wheel you can do a turn you don't even like the real and then I know this when I looked outside the window of the car I had no wheels that needs to be fixed That's a dead kill right there once I seen that kind of killed by immersion cuz I want to see if my wheels were spinning and turning when I turn the wheel and the steering wheel definitely need to be adjusted and fixed it's like my hand it just ghosts in the steering wheel for some reason I air show me Griffin it but when I turn my hands are slides the steering wheel just slide between my hands and don't really like give me that turn like I feel like I'm really turning and that kind of ruined the game you can fix that add more tracks levels and cars this game will be good keep up the good work if you still working on this game or update will be nice levels with tunnels major overhaul in this game you can fix these problems you got something going here 2026 come on you need some updates it's a good game just need more levels more cars and the steering needs to be fixed and it car needs wheels now I know I ain't got no wheels and feel awkward plus the steering they don't turn hard like you supposed to please put wheels on a car and fix the steering wheel

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback!

Glad you’re enjoying the visuals and overall feel. We hear you on needing more tracks, cars, and features like weather and night driving.

The steering and hand grip issues we are working on improving that. The missing wheels bug is also a issue, and we’ll get that fixed.

Stay tuned  we’re bringing more cars, tracks, and a lot more soon!

reviews.review_description: Thrust Hunter is an exciting VR racing game that delivers fast-paced action and immersive gameplay. Players race high-performance cars on dynamic tracks with realistic driving physics and competitive challenges. The multiplayer races and customization options make every race thrilling and enjoyable for VR racing fans.

reviews.review_title: This Game has finally got update ❤️
reviews.review_description:
I was waiting for an update from the developers, its great this game is free to play as i have seen most games way worse are getting sold for 10-20 bucks easily.
I hope it stays free 😅
The game makes racing feel real. Very fun to play in VR.
awful just awful
It’s already solid, but adding multiplayer and improving overall quality would make it way more fun and realistic.
Could be better and needs better quality if it gets better quality people would buy it and make it a little bit more realistic by little I’m mean ￼a decent amount

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your honest feedback we really appreciate it! 

We’re continuously working on improving the game’s quality and realism, including graphics, physics, and overall performance. Player feedback like yours helps us understand what to focus on next.

We’ve recently released an update, and more improvements are on the way. Please keep an eye out for upcoming updates, and feel free to share any specific suggestions you’d like to see.

reviews.review_description: Thrust Hunter is fast and exciting. Racing in VR feels amazing.
bad game don't get it
It’s shows good qualitybut bad and car dont look same

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We truly appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts with us. 

We are continuously improving the game based on user feedback, and we have recently released an update with several improvements and fixes. Please update to the latest version and check it out , we’d love to hear what you think after trying the new update!

Thanks again for supporting our game.

reviews.review_description:
Can you add a 2025 Corvette C8 in there?
￼

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the suggestion! 

Yes, we’re currently in the process of adding the 2025 Corvette C8 along with several other new cars. We’re excited to expand the lineup.

Also, we’ve just released a new update  please make sure to check it out and let us know what you think. More great content is on the way!

reviews.review_description: Very fast and exciting. Smooth VR racing with simple controls.
Perfect for new VR players, simple and fun.
Thrust Hunter VR is a fun and exciting game with smooth controls, cool action, and an amazing VR experience for all players.
This VR game is easy, exciting, and fun for all types of players.
A simple but exciting VR game that keeps players entertained for hours.
Fun matches and easy gameplay make it a great VR experience.
Fast gameplay, cool action, and easy controls make this VR game very fun.
Simple Controls and fun gameplay. Anyone can enjoy it.
Fast cars and smooth driving make it very enjoyable.
Thrust Hunter VR gives a thrilling and fun racing experience.
Good graphics and smooth driving. A fun VR racing game.
Thrust Hunter is exciting. Cars are fast and racing feels real in VR.
Fast cars and cool tracks make this game very enjoyable.
Driving feels real with fast cars and cool tracks.
Thrust Hunter VR is simple, fast, and very entertaining.

reviews.review_title: Fun and Easy Racing VR Game
reviews.review_description: Good cars, nice tracks, and smooth gameplay. Very fun VR racing game.
It was a fast paced, immersive VR racing with realistic cars, dynamic tracks.
Every race is fast and thrilling. I like the VR driving experience.
The game runs smooth. Driving feels easy and fun.
High speed and sharp turns make racing exciting.

reviews.review_title: One Of The Best VR Racing Game
reviews.review_description: Easy controls and fast cars. I like this racing game
Every match is fast and full of action.
Driving in VR feels real. The races are thrilling and enjoyable.
Fast car and smart opponents make every race exciting
Every match is fun and full of action.
